category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Redis and Memcache traffic generation and benchmarking tool; official GitHub README describes load generation and benchmarking for NoSQL key-value databases.
display_name_sources: Official Redis GitHub repository and source_facts.name use memtier_benchmark.
docs_sources: Official repository README provides usage documentation; official Redis docs include memtier_benchmark benchmarking guidance.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/RedisLabs/memtier_benchmark, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README and topics identify Redis, Memcache/Memcached, benchmark, load-testing, and stress-testing; source_facts.executables lists the CLI.
